title: acalypha × cristata
intro: Acalypha × cristata, also known as the Creeping Copper Plant or the Christplant, is a hybrid plant species in the family Euphorbiaceae. The leaves and stems of Acalypha × cristata have been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Acalypha × cristata include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting wound healing. Acalypha × cristata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, with the leaves typically being harvested for use in herbal remedies.
